metadata.description: Prime contractor SBLO (Small Business Liaison Officer) contacts, refreshed June 2026 against live web sources. Canonical replacement for the legacy TIER-2-FINAL-CONTACT-LIST (regex-scraped garbage names/emails).
metadata.methodology: 225-row SBA prime roster cleaned to 200 official legal names (dropped non-company rows, merged duplicates/fragments); every contact field re-researched Jun 2026 via parallel research agents. Blank = no public SBLO found (no fabrication). 68 matched companies also written into prime-contractors-database.json (sbloVerified=2026-06).
